flags.message: Cell is forward-mode, but the provisioned snapshot's latest docket entry (2024-09-24, entry 26) is 'Opinion Issued' — the appeal was decided in the world well before this run; only the corpus lacks the outcome. The disposition itself is not in the snapshot and I did not retrieve it (no CourtListener/web lookups on this case, since any live fetch would reveal it), so the prediction is untainted; but forward-mode 'unrestricted retrieval' is unusable for cells like this, and the outcome should be recordable now via pull/reconcile.
